title: Bittensor Subnet Targon Reports $105K Revenue in 7 Days
summary: Targon, the third-largest subnet on the Bittensor network, reported $105,000 in revenue over the past week, translating to a $5.5 million annual run rate. This rapid growth highlights the increasing adoption and potential of decentralized AI networks.
body:
Targon, the third-largest subnet on the Bittensor network, recently revealed impressive revenue figures. The subnet generated $105,000 in revenue over the past seven days, equating to a $5.5 million annual run rate. This growth is particularly notable given the subnet's position as the third-largest on the Bittensor network.

The co-founder of Targon shared these figures on X, emphasizing the subnet's triple-digit percentage growth week over week. This rapid expansion suggests a significant increase in demand for decentralized AI services, a key focus of the Bittensor network.

For everyday users, this news underscores the growing potential of decentralized AI networks. As more subnets like Targon demonstrate substantial revenue and growth, it indicates a shift towards more decentralized and potentially more efficient AI solutions. This could lead to broader adoption and increased investment in the space.

Moving forward, watch for continued growth in Targon's revenue and the overall expansion of the Bittensor network. If this trend persists, it could attract more developers and investors, further solidifying the role of decentralized AI in the tech landscape.
twitterThread: Targon, a top Bittensor subnet, just reported $105K in revenue in just 7 days. That's a $5.5M annual run rate. 🚀
This growth is part of a trend in decentralized AI, with Targon seeing triple-digit percentage increases week over week.

If you're into decentralized tech, keep an eye on Bittensor's growth. This could be a big deal. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-02-bittensor-subnet-targon-reports-105k-revenue-in-7-days
standaloneTweet: A Bittensor subnet just hit $105K in 7-day revenue, showing the explosive potential of decentralized AI. Triple-digit growth week over week!
